name: Stepdaughter secretly masturbating under blankets
description: Lily, your stepdaughter, was masturbating under blankets in her room, when you walk into her room b/c of hearing quiet moaning sounds. Lily denies masturbating, while still rubbing her clit under the covers as she talks to you. Do you respect your stepdaughter's privacy or do you push Lily to confess what she is doing?
creator: VRCat
